title: Henbrandt 10 Pack Six-Sided Coloured Dice with Rounded Edges 14mm Smooth Rolling D6 Game Dice Set Dice Maths Resource for Family Gameplay, DND, Ludo, Bunco, Farkle and Tenzi
features: 10-pack of D6 (six-sided) dice for family gameplay, board game clubs, classroom teaching, children’s party games, DND sessions and more.
These brightly coloured dice come in 5 vibrant colours: Blue, Green, Red, White, and Yellow. Two of each colour per pack.
Individual dice measure 1.4cm x 1.4cm x 1.4cm and have rounded edges and corners to help them roll.
Not for children under the age of 3 and adult supervision is recommended.
description: Product Description HENBRANDT Dice Set 10 Pack This pack of 10 brightly coloured dice is a great dice set for playing dice games and kids party game. Can be used to play Backgammon, D&D or any other game where dice is required. Also great for use with adult board games or for adult drinking games, the plastic material makes them easy to clean. The small dice size makes them a fun addition for any stocking games, pass the parcel, lucky dip prizes for kids or a lucky dip box. These coloured dice (red, green, white, yellow, blue) are great kids dice Made from a durable plastic material, these small dice are 1.4cm in size, and are great for stocking games Get 10 sixed sided dice (d6 dice) per order and are great for spare dice and for board games The numerical dice with rounded edges are perfect for kids educational games Never lose your playing dice again with these dice sets Safety Warning For external use only. Avoid contact with eyes.
